title: Fedi
description: Fedi packages federated Bitcoin-backed ecash into a user-facing app with community and recovery workflows. It inherits ecash mint trust assumptions while making shared custody models easier to use.

resources.title: Fedi Alpha README
resources.notes: Product-level overview of Fedi's federated wallet experience.

resources.title: Fedimint README
resources.notes: Underlying federated ecash protocol and implementation context.

resources.notes: Higher-level context for ecash systems that Fedi builds on.
